title: Raspberry Bliss Fritters
description: Fresh and dense Raspberry Bliss Fritters are a delicious, low-carb date-night dish that pairs perfectly with your favorite coffee or tea.
instructions: Blend raspberries in a food processor to make raspberry puree.
Mix raspberry puree, dates, ground flaxseed, baking powder (and cocoa powder if using), and raspberry jam until well combined. Season with a pinch of salt or sugar as desired.
In another bowl, mix almond flour or almond meal with 1-2 tablespoons water to create a paste.
Dip one portion of the mixture into the almond paste and roll it in your hands until coated completely. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Fry the fritters in hot air fryer at 350°F (175°C) for about 4-5 minutes or until golden brown. Flip them halfway through cooking to ensure even browning.
Serve immediately and enjoy these delightful, low-carb treats as a dessert with your favorite beverages.
